pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads and saves the file to this path.
Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh which downloads from this exact URL. The file's internal tags confirm it is real Landsat 7 TOA imagery.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real Landsat 7 satellite image downloaded from github.com/opengeos/data, saved to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Internal GeoTIFF tags indicate the source is the LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR dataset from Google Earth Engine. While the task description explicitly instructs the user to treat the 4 bands as SWIR1, NIR, Red, and Green respectively (and the verifier strictly scores based on this specific mapping), correlation and pixel analysis indicate the bands are actually the standard Landsat 7 visible/NIR bands (Blue, Green, Red, NIR).
